title: Competition: Defence Innovation Loans FY25/26 Cycle 6
body: "A video has been recorded to give you all the information you need about applying for a Defence Innovation Loan:  Video: Defence Innovation Loans Explained – from Application to Award.  Proposals must be submitted via the DASA submission service. If you are not already registered to use this portal, you can register here. We recommend you use a Google Chrome browser when accessing the Enterprise Collaboration Service.   Register If you do not already have an account..  Login If you already have an account..   For more information on the Defence Innovation Loan Competition and how to apply for funding, please read the Competition Document: Defence Innovation Loans above. "
